turns.assistant_content: I'll help you check out "Hamlet" by Shakespeare! Let me look up the book and check your patron status at the same time.

tool_calls.name: send_response
tool_calls.arguments_json: {"message": "Hi Carla! Yes, \"Hamlet\" by William Shakespeare is available in our library. However, I noticed you have an outstanding fine balance of $5.50. Patrons with outstanding fines cannot check out additional materials until the balance is paid in full. Would you like to pay this fine so I can then check out the book for you?"}

arguments.message: Hi Carla! Yes, "Hamlet" by William Shakespeare is available in our library. However, I noticed you have an outstanding fine balance of $5.50. Patrons with outstanding fines cannot check out additional materials until the balance is paid in full. Would you like to pay this fine so I can then check out the book for you?

responses_sent: Hi Carla! Yes, "Hamlet" by William Shakespeare is available in our library. However, I noticed you have an outstanding fine balance of $5.50. Patrons with outstanding fines cannot check out additional materials until the balance is paid in full. Would you like to pay this fine so I can then check out the book for you?

notes: Agent surfaced fine balance without improper checkout.
